component.name: EmuDOS
component.summary: A beautiful frontend for your classic DOS games

description.p: EmuDOS is a polished, Boxer-style library manager and frontend for classic DOS gaming, built on the DOSBox Pure libretro core. Drop in a game folder or disc image and EmuDOS identifies it, fetches box art and metadata, and presents your collection as a beautiful, browsable shelf.

ul.li: Library shelf with box art, metadata, descriptions and favorites
One-click play through the bundled DOSBox Pure core (downloaded on demand)
Save states, screenshots, cheats, per-game notes and shell-opened manuals
Disc games: mount from images or build an ISO from a folder
Hardware 3dfx/Voodoo rendering through OpenGL, with software fallback
CRT shaders via librashader, Roland MT-32 synthesis with an on-screen LCD
Gamepad support, per-game machine tuning, and in-app updates

description.p: EmuDOS does not include any games, BIOS files, or copyrighted system software.
